notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino singles on a ground ball to right fielder Connor Joe. Maikel Garcia scores. Bobby Witt Jr. to 3rd. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd. Vinnie Pasquantino advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by right fielder Connor Joe.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas singles on a line drive to center fielder Julio Rodríguez. Salvador Perez scores.
